summary: The build failed during native compilation of pandas C/C++ sources, producing errors in a SIMD header which caused package metadata generation to fail and the job to exit with code 1.
root_cause: C/C++ compilation errors in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp (reported at or near line 255) caused the build to fail and metadata generation to abort.

evidence.reason: Shows a compilation error was reported in the SIMD header file (path and approximate location).
Indicates the compiler produced errors during the build.
Shows that package metadata generation failed as a result of the preceding errors.

evidence.quote: × Encountered error while generating package metadata.
evidence.reason: Confirms the packaging step (metadata generation) failed due to the encountered error.
Demonstrates the CI job terminated with a non-zero exit status because of the failure.
Indicates the build system (meson) was invoked to configure/build the project when the failure occurred.

suggested_fix: Fix the C/C++ compilation errors in '../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp' (around the reported line 255), ensure the code is compatible with the macOS/clang toolchain used in CI, then re-run the build/packaging (metadata generation) step.
